title: SAIL Notification 2026 - Walk-in interview for 02 Radiologist/ Sonologist Posts
description: The Steel Authority of India (SAIL) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 02 Radiologist/ Sonologist Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS, MD/MS, and DNB can apply for the SAIL Notification 2026 . Interested applicants can attend the walk-in interview. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, selection process, applica...
